Alien description:

it looks a bit like an octopus, it has a very small mouth with no teeth instead of a beek. It's completely white with 10 tentacles with suckers and the head is a simple small circle with no eyes. It's main body/head is around the size of a human fist, but like an octopus it's very squishy and can pretty much squeeze into anything.

It can't talk and has little understanding of things but it understands tone of voice, just not words.

Scenario:
